I make a fake snoring sound because I’m a bad actor. I return to normal and point to his clock. Along with perfect memory, Eridians are extremely good at math. At least, Rocky is. As we worked our way through scientific units, it became immediately apparent that he can convert from his units to mine in the blink of an eye. And he has no problem understanding base ten.
Eridian name for my star is ♫♩♪♪♪.
